Class GsonXMLStreamReader

java.lang.Object
org.apache.axis2.json.gson.GsonXMLStreamReader
All Implemented Interfaces:
XMLStreamConstants, XMLStreamReader
public class GsonXMLStreamReader extends Object implements XMLStreamReader
